debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons h t ih =>
    simp only [smaller, larger, List.filter_cons]
    by_cases hle : h ≤ pivot <;> by_cases hgt : pivot < h <;> simp_all [List.count_cons]

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons head tail ih =>
    simp only [smaller, larger, List.filter_cons]
    by_cases h : head ≤ pivot
    · simp only [h, decide_True, List.filter_cons_of_pos]
      by_cases hx : head = x
      · simp only [hx, List.count_cons_self]
        by_cases hpx : pivot < x
        · omega
        · simp only [hpx, decide_False, List.filter_cons_of_neg, not_lt]
          omega
      · simp only [List.count_cons_of_ne (Ne.symm hx)]
        by_cases hpx : pivot < head
        · omega
        · simp only [hpx, decide_False, List.filter_cons_of_neg, not_lt]
          simp only [List.count_cons_of_ne (Ne.symm hx)]
          omega
    · simp only [h, decide_False, List.filter_cons_of_neg, not_le]
      push_neg at h
      simp only [h, decide_True, List.filter_cons_of_pos]
      by_cases hx : head = x
      · simp only [hx, List.count_cons_self]
        omega
      · simp only [List.count_cons_of_ne (Ne.symm hx)]
        omega
